mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pay_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(actual_amount) AS income, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM order_info WHERE status = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(pay_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_amount), 0) AS total_amount, COUNT(*) AS paid_order_count FROM order_info WHERE status = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(p.name), ''), CONCAT('商品#', o.product_id)) AS name, SUM(o.actual_amount) AS income, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.status = 1 AND o.pay_time IS NOT NULL AND o.product_id IS NOT NULL AND o.order_type != 'COURSE' GROUP BY o.product_id, p.name ORDER BY income DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT order_type, SUM(actual_amount) AS income FROM order_info WHERE status = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY order_type
